Container.Name: snake
Container.Overview:
Snake is a self-hosted, lightweight traditional snake game application built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - Traditional arcade-style snake game loop. - Optional security access locking using a PIN.
Container.Requires: If you lock the application with a PIN, it is recommended to set a strong PIN and back up your data directory. Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box. Ensure the mapped host appdata folder has read/write permissions for UID 99 / GID 100.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4407).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the interface. (Optional, not required. Leave empty for unlocked public mode.)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for snake database files.
